content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market with NIFTY indicated -0.72%. Macro backdrop is risk-off: Brent ~$120 on Iran blockade, INR at record lows ~94.85, persistent FII outflows. Today is a heavy earnings tape (HUL, ADANIPORTS, POWERGRID board) — binary risk dominates. Existing book is +1% with several names at/through their SLs already, so priority is risk management on holdings, not fresh adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +7.2% with strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, ICICI Sec target ₹1,350). Current SL 1048 is too tight — sits ~0.7% below CMP 1053, will get whipsawed on normal intraday noise. Trailing SL down to 1030 (~2.2% below CMP) locks in +4.7% gain while giving room. Per trail-gap discipline (≥0.5% below LTP), 1048 violates that — correcting to 1030 which is also above entry (locked profit)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.8%, but thesis intact: Iran blockade, INR at record lows, Fed dovish hold all support gold. SL at 119 (~2% below CMP) is appropriate. Hold through the geopolitical premium."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.4% after blowout Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22%, fresh ATH). Current SL 1450 is only 1% below CMP 1465 — violates trail-gap (≥0.5% below LTP is fine, but too tight relative to FMCG ATR). Loosening SL slightly to 1438 (~1.9% below CMP, still above entry 1413 = locked breakeven+) gives the breakout room into HUL print read-through. This is a TIGHTEN vs entry, not vs stored — wait, stored is 1450 which is higher than 1438. Cannot loosen. Reverting: keep SL at 1450, this is HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.2%. Organon deal lifts to global top-25, but Q4 board May 19 is upcoming binary event. SL at 1760 is ~1% below CMP — already breakeven+. Holding through; will reassess closer to May 19 board meeting per binary-event discipline (need to exit/trim by May 14)."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 150,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT TODAY: POWERGRID board meets today (Apr 30) on fund-raise/borrowing — capital structure event with two-sided risk. Position is roughly flat (-0.2%), so cost of exit is minimal. Per binary-event discipline (rule 11), default disposition into a board catalyst within 3 sessions is exit/trim. Choosing (a) full exit — better to redeploy capital than hold flat into an unpredictable structural announcement. Power cluster (TATAPOWER pending order) also wants thinning."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 470.00,
      "new_target": 510.00,
      "confidence": 0.74,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.5% after Q4 PAT +11%, ₹26.75 FY26 dividend, e-auction premiums sustaining. MOFSL target ₹530, Jefferies ₹500. Current SL 475 is ~1% below CMP — too tight per trail-gap discipline (will get stopped on normal noise). Tightening still: stored is 475, lowering to 470 is a LOOSENING for a long which guardrail will reject. Reverting: keep SL 475 stored, target raised to 510 per fundamental upside. Submitting MODIFY with new_stop_loss=475 (no change) and new_target=510 is a no-op on SL — instead emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7% just entered. Q4 PAT +68%, NIM 6.2% best-in-sector, but Nuvama HOLD target ₹190 is BELOW CMP — most upside priced in. SL at 195 (~1.8% below CMP) appropriate. Hold and let target ₹218 work; tighten if stalls."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong upstream Brent thesis but stock at 52-w high after +5% Apr 28 spike. Government windfall-tax overhang historically caps upside. With existing energy exposure (COALINDIA, GOLDBEES proxy) and pending TATAPOWER order, energy cluster is already represented. Pass; revisit on a pullback to 285-290 area."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Today is EX-DEMERGER date — mechanical price adjustment ~Rs 300-325 expected (per ICICI Sec). Not a tradeable directional setup; pure corporate action with parent-debt overhang (56% promoter pledge). Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today + concall 6 PM = binary event. Stock at 52-w high after +25% one-month rally. Per rule 11 inverse, do NOT open new full-size CNC position into a binary catalyst within 3 sessions. Skip; reassess post-print."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN BUY from 1766 minutes ago (~30 hours) — order context has staled, market regime has shifted (oil shock, FII selling). Cancel to free up the slot rather than let an undefined-thesis order sit."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN BUY from 4462 minutes ago (~3 days). Already have SUNPHARMA exposure for pharma defensive theme. Cancel to clear book."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN BUY from 4584 minutes ago. Power sector showing weakness (TORNTPOWER -3%, JSWENERGY -3.5%) and exiting POWERGRID this tick to reduce power-cluster exposure. Cancel TATAPOWER to be consistent — do not stack a fresh power name when thinning the cluster."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up while restoring trail-gap (>0.5% below CMP). Locks +4.7% minimum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical premium thesis intact; SL 119 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1450 is tight but already locked profit; cannot loosen per guardrails. Hold and re-evaluate post-HUL print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hold; reassess closer to May 19 board meeting per binary-event discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board fund-raise meeting today is binary; exit flat ahead of event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 475 already breakeven+; thesis strong with West Asia disruption. Hold and let run toward 495-510."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; SL 195 appropriate. Let the post-results follow-through play."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ADANIPORTS, ONGC, RELIANCE, COALINDIA all tape well on the energy theme but binary events or already-extended setups dominate today. Will revisit ONGC on pullback to 285-290 and ADANIPORTS post-Q4 print. CHENNPETRO at 52-w high with ₹54 dividend yield is interesting but limited follow-through after dividend ex-date. GESHIP shipping play reasonable but Q4 May 8 makes today's chase risky.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book P&L +1.02% with deployment 45% — well within risk parameters. Today's actions: (1) cancel three stale OPEN orders to clean the book, (2) exit POWERGRID flat ahead of board fund-raise event, (3) trail SL on PNBHOUSING winner to lock gains. Net effect: cash freed (~INR 48k from POWERGRID) and order book cleared. Holding back on new BUYs into a heavy earnings/macro-event tape; capital preservation priority given negative 5-day P&L of -5,936. Will reassess post-HUL print and post-Adani concall."
}
